items.title: I built a 50+ feature wellness app in a single HTML file as a student — here's why
items.description:
Most people lose hours pretending to work or study. I was one of them.

I kept setting Pomodoro timers and ending up scrolling Twitter during breaks.
That's not rest. That's just a different kind of distraction.
